purpose: Env-var CRUD + redeploy trigger on a specific project

minimum_scope.description: Vercel Account API tokens carry the full set of scopes the issuing user has. The narrowest practical setup is a dedicated team-bot user with membership ONLY in the team that owns the project kit manages, and the token's 'Scope' set to that specific team (not 'All teams').
minimum_scope.expiration: Set token expiration to 90 days; renew via kit secrets rotate
